buildpack.title: Building Pack Manager
buildpack.tooltip.install: Convert the selected structure and install it into the simukraftbuilding directory
buildpack.tooltip.batch: Install every listed file into the category currently selected in the form
buildpack.tooltip.uninstall: Delete this building's .sk and structure files
buildpack.tooltip.delete: Delete the selected file from the import directory (click twice to confirm)
buildpack.tooltip.export: Bundle installed buildings into a zip pack and open the export directory
buildpack.tooltip.open_folder: Open the directory for the current tab
buildpack.tooltip.overwrite: When checked, a building with the same name is overwritten instead of renamed
buildpack.tooltip.tab.import: Loose .nbt / .litematic / .schem files in the import directory (drag & drop supported)
buildpack.tooltip.tab.packs: Zip packs in the import directory
buildpack.tooltip.tab.installed: Buildings already in the simukraftbuilding directory
buildpack.tooltip.form.category: Which SimuKraft category directory the building installs into (decides its in-game role)
buildpack.tooltip.form.name: Display name; also used as the installed file name
buildpack.tooltip.form.amount: Construction price; SimuKraft built-ins use e.g. "8.64元"
buildpack.tooltip.form.author: Author credit
buildpack.tooltip.form.description: Short description (line breaks collapse to spaces in .sk)
buildpack.tooltip.form.job_type: Job id this building provides, e.g. breadShopOwner (empty = none)
buildpack.info.name: Name: %s
buildpack.info.author: Author: %s
buildpack.form.title: Install Info
buildpack.form.name: Name
buildpack.form.author: Author
buildpack.sort.name: Name
buildpack.materials.title: Materials (%s types)
buildpack.detail.empty: Select a file to view details
buildpack.status.remote_warning: Connected to a remote server: files are installed locally only; a dedicated server needs server-side installation
buildpack.msg.newer_version: Structure is from a newer game version (DataVersion %1$s > %2$s); cannot downgrade, construction may misbehave
buildpack.msg.missing_blocks: %1$s block types are missing (will become air): %2$s
buildpack.msg.large_structure: Large structure (%s); construction may take a long time
buildpack.msg.delete_confirm: Click "Delete File" again to confirm deleting %s
buildpack.error.zero_region: A litematic region has zero size
buildpack.error.invalid_nbt: Not a valid vanilla NBT structure (missing palette/blocks)
buildpack.error.pack_empty: Pack contains no buildings (no structure files under buildings/<category>/)
buildpack.cmd.bad_category: Unknown category: %s (valid: residential / commercial / industry / public / other)
buildpack.log.litematic_bad_indices: Litematic region has %s out-of-range palette indices, treated as air
buildpack.log.pack_single_failed: Failed to install single pack building: %s
buildpack.log.import_attrs_failed: Failed to read import file attributes: %s
